serverInfo.name: ConsentGraph
serverInfo.description: Least-privilege policy enforcement for AI agents. Define SILENT/VISIBLE/FORCED/BLOCKED action tiers in a JSON file.

tools.name: check_consent
tools.description: Check whether an action is permitted under the current consent graph. Returns tier: SILENT, VISIBLE, FORCED, or BLOCKED.

domain.description: The domain category (e.g. filesystem, email, cloud)

action.description: The specific action to check (e.g. read_file, send_email)

tools.name: load_graph
tools.description: Load a consent graph from a JSON file path.

tools.name: list_domains
tools.description: List all domains and their action tiers defined in the loaded consent graph.
